mapper.select:
SELECT d.id, d.id_site, d.devicename AS name, d.id_device_group, d.datatablename, d.view_tablename, dg.id_device_type, d.hidden, d.reverse_poa, dg.group_name, d.is_weather_to_calculate_expected, IFNULL(dt.title_trans, "N/A") AS type_title_trans, IFNULL(dg.title_trans, "N/A") AS group_title_trans, dg.table_name, dt.name AS device_type_name, dt.order, s.table_data_virtual, JSON_ARRAYAGG(JSON_OBJECT( 'id', dp.id, 'name', , 'slug', dp.slug, 'id_device_group', d.id_device_group, 'unit', dp.unit, 'is_checked', dp.is_checked, 'id_generic_parameter', gp.id, 'generic_parameter_name', gp.name, 'id_generic_parameter_type', gp.id_generic_parameter_type, 'value_chart_tool', dp.value_chart_tool, 'min_value', dpf.min_value, 'max_value', dpf.max_value, 'rounding_decimals', dp.rounding_decimals, 'is_energy', dp.is_energy, 'is_user_defined', dp.is_user_defined, 'slug_accumulated_energy', im.slug )) AS parameters, 0 AS checked FROM device d JOIN device_group dg ON d.id_device_group = dg.id JOIN device_type dt ON dt.id = dg.id_device_type JOIN site s ON d.id_site = s.id JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone JOIN device_parameters dp ON dp.id_device_group = dg.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT dp.slug, im.id_interval_energy_parameter FROM interval_accumulated_energy_parameter_map im JOIN device_parameters dp ON dp.id = im.id_accumulated_energy_parameter WHERE dp.status = 1 AND dp.is_delete = 0 AND dp.is_filter = 1 AND dp.is_energy = 1 AND dp.is_user_defined = 0 ) im ON im.id_interval_energy_parameter = dp.id LEFT JOIN device_parameter_filter dpf ON dp.id = dpf.id_device_parameter AND d.id = dpf.id_device LEFT JOIN generic_parameters gp ON gp.id = dp.id_generic_parameter WHERE SHA1(d.id_site) = #{hash_id_site} AND d.status = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND dg.id_device_type != 5 AND s.status = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0 AND dp.status = 1 AND dp.is_delete = 0 AND dp.is_filter = 1 AND (CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), 'UTC', t.value) < s.expiration OR s.expiration IS NULL)
GROUP BY d.id ORDER BY dt.order ASC, d.devicename ASC

SELECT data_send_time, DATE_FORMAT(commissioning, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS commissioning, DATE_FORMAT(built_since, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS built_since, ac_capacity, dc_capacity, minimum_energy_value, interval_energy_threshold, pv_model, global_solar_irradiance_at_stc, pv_module_temperature_coeff, stc_temperature, system_loss, inverter_efficiency, annual_pv_module_degradation, soiling, cable_losses, transformer_losses, other_losses, min_irradiance_limit, clip, t_avg FROM site WHERE status = 1 AND is_delete = 0 AND id = #{id}
SELECT date_from, date_to FROM hidden_data WHERE id_device = #{id} AND status = 1 AND is_delete = 0

when.test: (filterBy == '3_day' or filterBy == 'this_week' or filterBy == 'last_week') and data_send_time == 8
(filterBy == '3_day' or filterBy == 'this_week' or filterBy == 'last_week') and data_send_time == 1
(filterBy == '3_day' or filterBy == 'this_week' or filterBy == 'last_week') and data_send_time == 2
(filterBy == '3_day' or filterBy == 'this_week' or filterBy == 'last_week') and data_send_time == 3
(filterBy == '3_day' or filterBy == 'this_week' or filterBy == 'last_week') and data_send_time == 4

(filterBy == 'this_month' or filterBy == 'last_month' or filterBy == '12_month' or filterBy == 'year' or filterBy == 'lifetime' or filterBy == 'custom') and (data_send_time == 8 or data_send_time == 1 or data_send_time == 2 or data_send_time == 3 or data_send_time == 4)

choose.when: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(#{end_date}, #{start_date}) <= 44 THEN DATE_FORMAT( ${time}, '%m/%d' ) ELSE DATE_FORMAT( ${time}, '%b. %Y' ) END

when.test: (filterBy == 'this_month' or filterBy == 'last_month' or filterBy == '12_month' or filterBy == 'year' or filterBy == 'lifetime' or filterBy == 'custom') and data_send_time == 5

choose.when: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(#{end_date}, #{start_date}) <= 44 THEN DATE_FORMAT( DATE_SUB(${time}, INTERVAL (MOD(DATEDIFF(${time}, #{start_date}), 7 )) DAY), '%m/%d' ) ELSE DATE_FORMAT( ${time}, '%b. %Y' ) END

when.test: (filterBy == 'this_month' or filterBy == 'last_month' or filterBy == '12_month' or filterBy == 'year' or filterBy == 'lifetime' or filterBy == 'custom') and data_send_time == 6

mapper.select:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS time, AS categories_time,
AS time_full, FROM_UNIXTIME((UNIX_TIMESTAMP(CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value )) DIV )* , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS time_full_by_site_uploading_interval,
dv.${param.slug_accumulated_energy}
dv.nvmActiveEnergy
dv.nvmActivePower, dv.nvmActiveEnergy
dv.expected_power_ac
dv.nvm_irradiance, dv.nvm_temperature, dv.nvm_panel_temperature
dv.nvm_irradiance
dv.${param.slug}
FROM ${datatablename} dv JOIN device d ON d.id = dv.id_device JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone WHERE dv.id_device = #{id} AND dv.time BETWEEN CONVERT_TZ(#{start_date}, t.value, 'UTC') AND CONVERT_TZ(#{end_date}, t.value, 'UTC')
dv.time NOT BETWEEN CONVERT_TZ(#{item.date_from}, t.value, 'UTC') AND CONVERT_TZ(#{item.date_to}, t.value, 'UTC')
mapper.sql:
SELECT SUM(value) AS value, time_group_by_interval FROM ( SELECT AVG(dv.nvm_irradiance) / 1000 AS value, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00' ) AS time_group_by_hour, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%Y-%m-%d') AS time_group_by_day,
AS time_group_by_interval FROM ${datatablename} dv JOIN device d ON d.id = dv.id_device JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone WHERE dv.id_device = #{id} AND dv.time BETWEEN CONVERT_TZ(#{start_date}, t.value, 'UTC') AND CONVERT_TZ(#{end_date}, t.value, 'UTC') GROUP BY time_group_by_hour ) t GROUP BY
time_group_by_day time_group_by_interval

SELECT AVG(value) AS value, time_group_by_interval FROM (
) t GROUP BY time_group_by_interval
mapper.select: SELECT id, id_employee, id_site, params, DATE_FORMAT(created_date, "%m/%d/%Y %H:%i:%s") AS created_date, name, is_favorite FROM employee_chart_filter WHERE id_employee = #{id_employee} AND SHA1(id_site) = #{hash_id_site} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee_chart_filter ( `id_employee`, `id_site`, `params`, `created_date`, `name`, `is_favorite` ) SELECT #{id_employee} AS id_employee, id AS id_site, #{params} AS params, #{created_date} AS created_date, #{name} AS name, #{is_favorite} AS is_favorite FROM site WHERE SHA1(id) = #{hash_id_site};
